title: BPSC AEDO Admit Card 2026 Released: Download Link Here; Exam From April 14
description: BPSC AEDO Admit Card 2026 OUT: The AEDO written examination will begin on April 14 and continue until April 21. The exam will be conducted across multiple districts in the state on April 14, 15, 17, 18, 20, and 21.
